description:
[i]The design and concept are based on the [url=https://x.com/ZZZ_EN/status/2027964547999371359]Zenless Zone Zero promotional art/UI[/url].[/i]

[h2]Credits & Resources[/h2]
All characters and related assets are property of their respective owners.

[list]
[*] [b]Developer[/b]: [url=https://www.mihoyo.com/]miHoYo Co., Ltd.[/url]
[*] [b]Global Publisher[/b]: [url=https://www.hoyoverse.com/]HoYoverse (Cognosphere Pte., Ltd.)[/url]
[*] [b]ZZZ Glyphs Font[/b]: [url=https://github.com/SpeedyOrc-C/HoYo-Glyphs]HoYo-Glyphs by SpeedyOrc-C[/url]
[*] [b]Characters' name & faction font[/b]: [url=https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Abril+Fatface]AbrilFatface[/url]
[*] [b]Primary Font[/b]: [url=https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Poppins]Poppins (via Google Fonts)[/url]
[*] [b]Secondary Font[/b]: [url=https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Rajdhani]Rajdhani (via Google Fonts)[/url]
[*] [b]All ZZZ Resources[/b]: Images, logos, and related assets are sourced from official ZZZ media.
[/list]

[h2]Source Code[/h2]
Available on GitHub: [url=http://github.com/Simplezes/ZenlessWallpaper]Simplezes/ZenlessWallpaper[/url]
title: Zenless Zone Zero: Character Dashboard
